title: Stichorkis aptenodytes
taxonomy: Stichorkis aptenodytes is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Sri Lanka. The classification of Stichorkis aptenodytes is further divided into the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Coelogyneae. This orchid species is often found growing in well-drained areas and among rocks. Its classification helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other plants and its unique characteristics.
